texts.full_text: do I get all the files with a particular extension inside a directory? I need to get all the files with a particular extension inside a folder without having to cd into that folder in cmd. Some thing similar toCertainly! You can achieve this using various commands depending on your operating system. Here are examples for both Windows and Linux/Unix-based systems: ### On Windows: You can use the `dir` command with `/b /s`. For example, if you want all `.txt` files from a directory called "Documents" without changing into that folder using Command Prompt (cmd), run this in cmd.exe or PowerShell while being anywhere else on your system. ```shell cd \path\to\ forfiles /p "\Path\To\Folder\" /s /m *.ext | findstr "\\" ``` Or, more simply: - Using `dir`: ```bash dir "C:\Users\<YourUsername>\Documents" /b/s *.<extension> ``` Replace `<path>` with the path to your directory and `.txt`, or any other extension you're looking for. ### On Linux/Unix/MacOS (using Bash): You can use `find` command which is very powerful. Here's how: ```bash find /Path/to/Folder -type f \( ! -iname ".*" \) 2>/dev/null | grep '\.<extension>$' ``` Or simply: - Using the glob pattern with ls (less flexible but works in simple cases): ```shell ls <path>//*.<ext> ``` Replace `<Path/to/Folder>` and `.txt` or any other extension you're looking for. ### On Linux/Unix/MacOS using `find`(more robust): ```bash find /full/path -type f \( ! -iname ".*" \) 2>/dev/null | grep '\.ext$' ``` Replace `/path/to/folder` with the path to your directory and `.txt`, or any other extension you're looking for. These commands will list all files of a particular type within that folder, including subfolders

Twenty trains and up to 1,200 Jewish prisoners left Milan in this fashion to be murdered, predominantly at Auschwitz. Milan during the German occupation Background After the Italian surrender on 8 September 1943 and the occupation of northern Italy by German forces, Milan became a centre for processing, interrogating and torturing captured Jews before deportation. The city's Jewish community was one of Europe's oldest, with deep historical roots that did not deter Nazi Germany from targeting it as part its genocidal campaign in Italy during World War II. In September-October 1943 German Gestapo took over the San Vittore prison to use for Jews captured across northern and central parts of post-'armistice' Italian territories, transforming Milan into a key hub where Jewish deportees were detained before being sent on transports headed towards extermination camps. During this period many members from local resistance groups attempted hiding their fellow citizens but unfortunately numerous others fell victim to betrayal or circumstance leading them directly in path of persecution orchestrated by occupying forces; among these was also the Milano Centrale railway station which served as primary transit point for Holocaust trains leaving Italy bound towards destinations like Auschwitz. Platform 21, an underground platform at Stazione centrale di Firenze built specifically to facilitate this purpose remained largely unknown until after war's end when survivors began recounting harrowing experiences endured there; it has since become symbolically significant site representing both tragedy and resilience against genocide perpetrated under Nazi regime. texts.full_text: cerebral IR injury induced neurobehavioral deficits and brain damage in gerbils. Bilateral carotid artery occlusion induced global cerebral ischemia in gerbils resulted in neurological deficits, hyperlocomotion, reduced response latency in passive avoidance test and hippocampal damage. Hippocampal neurodegeneration after cerebral IR injury was also associated with significant increase in iNOS and MMP-9 immunoreactivity along with TNFα and IL-6 levels. Massive apoptotic DNA fragmentation as evident from increased TUNEL (terminal deoxynucleotidyl transferase mediated dUTP nick end labelling)-potomography was not detected post ischemia, indicating a significant role for programmed cell death in this injury model [1]. GW1929 administration significantly attenuated these physiological alterations by removing infection and inflammation markers. Through the modulation of PPARγ signalling pathway through anti-inflammatory actions within brain tissue – including reduced iNOS/MMP levels & inflammatory receptors Like TNFα, IL6 -GW1929 exhibits pronounced neuroprotection against global cerebral ischemic reperfusion injury [3]. In conclusion: GW1929 as a nonthiazolidinedione PPARγ inhibitor demonstrates robust protection in the model of chronic gerbil hippocampal degeneration induced by transient brain hypoxia-reoxygenation. This research highlighted an important clinical potential for targeting inflammatory pathways with therapeutic agents like PPRAgons, opening new avenues towards efficient therapy methods against global cerebral ischemia and related mental diseases [1]. But what happens when a task blocks before the tick interrupt? The documentation seems to hint that a context switch takes immediately place (for example,two task with different priorities each calling vTaskDelay() to free the CPU time slice). How does it happen? I searched but I couldn't find any answer to my question. EDIT in my port of FreeRTOS (SAMD21 Cortex-M0+) the portYIELD() macro is used that simply request a SVCall exception, so is this the mechanism that is used to perform context switching (aside from the scheduler running on tick interrupts)? A: There is documentation about taskYIELD. This function can be used to request context switch so no need to wait for thetick interrupt. Context switches in FreeRTOS occur whenever a higher-priority task becomes ready, or when there's an idle task running and other tasks are waiting with positive time remaining on their block semaphores (such as through calls to `vTaskDelay()`). In order to facilitate the immediate switching between these different threads without delaying until after the next tick interrupt: 1. Context Switches Following API Calls: A context switch can occur at any point during execution of an application code where it's safe, and so can be initiated manually from within kernel functions or task APIs such as `vTaskDelay()`. In this case a yield (context switches) occurs by calling the FreeRTOS function `taskYIELD()`. 2. SVC/PORT_YIELD macro: The way that context switching is achieved actually depends on how your particular hardware architecture defines it, which in turn makes use of ARM's SVCall exception, among others – effectively leaving some details abstracted away to ensure cross-architecture compatibility with various Cortex-M microcontrollers (which are the target devices for FreeRTOS implementations). texts.full_text: I am making an UI with Qt for Googles OR-Tools and when trying to build logs go haywire with redefinitions... The relevant part of my Qt project file looks like this LIBS += or-tools_VisualStudio2017-64bit_v7.0.6546/ortools.lib INCLUDEPATH += or-tools_VisualStudio2017-64bit_v7.0.6546/include DEPENDPATH += or-tools_VisualStudio2017-64bit_v7.0.6546/include The compiler complains about C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\include\10.0.17763.0\shared\ws2def.h(103): warning C4005: "AF_IPX": Makro-Neudefinition C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\include\10.0.17763.0\um\winsock.h(457): note: Siehe vorherige Definition von "AF_IPX" C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\include\10.0.17763.0\shared\ws2def.h(147): warning C4005: "AF_MAX": Makro-Neudefinition C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\include\10.0.17763.0\um\winsock.h(476): note: Siehe vorherige Definition von "AF_MAX" C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\include\10.0.17763.0\shared\ws2def.h(185): warning C4005: "SO_DONTLINGER": Makro-Neudefinition C:\PAnswer1: I solved it by adding the following to my Qt project file: DEFINES += WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN Solution 3: It looks like this is caused because of a conflict between two header files. You can try using preprocessor directives in order to avoid having both headers included at once. #ifndef _INC_WINDOWS #define _WIN32_WINNT // Specify target platform. #include <windows.h> // #endif Solution 4: The problem was the definition for AF_IPX and SO_DONTLINGER. It turns out that this is a known issue in Windows SDK v7, which Qt uses by default. To fix it you can use either of these solutions (I prefer #2): 1) Add -DWINVER=0x0503 to your project's DEFINES or: #include <winsock.h> // ... rest of the code #undef AF_IPX ### Similar Questions • ## How do I create a new Qt Creator Project that has an external library? Just take a look at the list of achievements to get just a small taste of all the references thrown into this game. Thursday, February 10, 2011 Just a little weekly post I wanted to try out to spotlight some one shot mangas that can be fun or interesting reads. One shots typically contain an entire story in just one volume so no long series to worry about with tons of back story and things. So with that out of the way here is the first! The Enigma of Amigara Fault Another earthquake has rocked Japan but this one left something mysterious in it's aftermath. The quake exposed a new fault line in the mountains with strange holes in it's side, the holes have human like sizes and shapes. This becomes a sensational news story and many people are drawn to the images on their TVs and begin a pilgrimage to the mountains to see this for themselves. When they arrive some find their own holes and are even further driven to learn about them through sheer curiosity or something unnatural no one can say but it seems to torment them until some snap and enter their hole. About the Polk Museum of Art at Florida Southern College The Polk Museum of Art at Florida Southern College in Lakeland, FlOrida, is a private, not-for-profit academic museum dedicated to promoting inspirational and engaging arts experiences for all. It is one of the Top 10 art museums in the State of Florida, an Affiliate of the Smithsonian Institution and the only art museum accredited by the American Alliance of Museums serving the 666,000 residents of Polk County. Museum hours are 10 a.m. – 5 p.m. Tuesdays – Saturdays; 1-5 p.m. Sundays (closed Sundays June 1 through Labor Day) and closed Mondays and major holidays. Admission is free for everyone year-round, thanks to the following organizations: MIDFLORIDA Credit Union; the Ting Tsung and Wei Fong Chao Foundation; and the Share Foundation. Thomas Land

A Thomas and Friends™ Experience

Edaville is the only theme park in North America to offer a full-scale, permanent themed attraction featuring all of your favorite characters from Sodor. This unique family experience offers over eleven rides that you can enjoy with Sir Topham Hatt while meeting some new friends along the way!

Meet Thomas & Friends™

Edaville is home to one very special engine: Thomas himself, who makes his grand entrance twice a day for sing-a-longs and meet-and greets. But that’s not all – you can also find Sir Topham Hatt roaming the park!

Thomas & Friends™ Rides

Join in on your favorite characters adventures with over eleven Thomas rides to choose from, including: Cranky Drops Cargo Ship; Harold's Heliport Helicopter Ride and Toby's Tilting Track. Plus don’t forget about Bertie Bus – he loves taking visitors around Edaville!

Thomas & Friends™ Play Areas

Explore all of the play areas at Thomas Land, including: Sodor Fire Station where you can help Harold save Flynn; Brendam Docks for cargo fun with Cranky and Salty or Tidmouth Sheds to see Sir Topham Hatt’s office.

texts.full_text: the Birdhouse *A southern girl chatting about books, ephemera, life, love, dogs and all things vintage!*Nothing says love like a gun-themed vintage Valentine! From the cowboy and cowgirl collection ... a little children's die-cut Valentine featuring a gun in a holster. This is 1950's vintage. Ah, the 1950s—a time when Americana and the Wild West collided in the most whimsical (and sometimes quirky) ways! This tiny die-cut Valentine, with its little leather holster and gleaming six-shooter, is a perfect example of how pop culture seeped into even the most romantic traditions. I can only imagine the story behind it: a young cowboy enthusiast, perhaps, or a parent with a fondness for Westerns who thought "why not combine love and adventure?" What fascinates me is how these vintage Valentines often reflect the trends and values of their time. The 1950s were all about boldness, nostalgia for a "simpler" frontier past, and a touch of kitsch. Standard of Care: In Virginia, the standard of care is determined by what a reasonably skilled and competent healthcare provider would do under similar circumstances. This is often established through expert testimony or by referencing established medical guidelines. 2. Causation: To succeed in a medical malpractice claim, the patient must prove that the provider's negligence directly caused their injury. This is typically demonstrated through medical records, expert opinions, and other evidence showing a causal link between the provider's actions and the injury sustained. 3. Damages: Damages in Virginia can include compensatory damages for medical expenses, pain and suffering, and possibly punitive damages if the provider's actions were particularly egregious. Virginia does not cap non-economic damages, but there are specific rules and considerations under the Virginia Medical Malpractice Act. 4. Recovery Challenges: Many medical malpractice victims in Virginia do not recover damages because proving negligence can be difficult. texts.full_text: tronic systems and circuits have made a significant contribution towards the advancement of modern society and are utilized in a number of applications to achieve advantageous results. Numerous electronic technologies such as digital computers, calculators, audiO devices, video equipment, and telephone systems have facilitated increased productivity and reduced costs in analyzing and communicating data in most areas of business, science, education and entertainment. The systems typically involve information storage and processing. However, traditional attempts at ecofriendly and sustainable electronic systems have often been hindered by the significant energy consumption and electronic waste generated by these devices. To mitigate these issues, recent advancements have focused on developing more energy-efficient components, renewable energy integration, and sustainable materials. For instance, the development of low-power microprocessors, energy-harvesting technologies, and the use of biodegradable materials are steps towards creating more eco-friendly electronic systems. Additionally, the concept of the circular economy, which emphasizes the reuse, repair, and recycling of electronic components, is gaining traction. This approach not only reduces electronic waste but also conserves valuable resources. Furthermore, the Internet of Things (IoT) and smart grid technologies are being employed to optimize energy usage and reduce the carbon footprint of electronic systems. These technologies enable real-time monitoring and control of energy consumption, leading to more efficient and sustainable operations. In conclusion, while electronic systems and circuits have revolutionized modern society, the focus is now shifting towards making these technologies more sustainable and environmentally friendly. texts.full_text: #### Add Product(s) Into Shopping Cart: Use Magento's API methods (`cart.create`, `catalog_product.info` for product details, and finally adding items via SOAP). Example with PHP: ```php // Create a new shopping basket. $quoteId = $client->call($session_id,'shoppingCartCreate',array('website')); $productDataArray[] = array( 'product' => $productSKU, // OR you can use product ID if preferred, //'qty'=>$quantityToOrder ); // Add the products to cart. $resultAddProduct = (int)$client->call($session_id,'shoppingCart_product.add',array('quoteId'=>(string)trim((integer)(floatval(trim(str_replace(',','',$thisQuoteID))))),'productsData' => $productArray)); ``` #### Handle Errors: Ensure that you handle any errors gracefully, such as invalid product SKUs or insufficient stock. Example: ```php if ($resultAddProduct == 0) { echo "Failed to add the item into cart."; } else { // Successfully added items. } ``` ### Important Considerations: - Stock Availability: Ensure that products are in-stock before adding them programmatically. You can check stock status via API calls as well. ```php $stockStatus = $client->call($session_id, 'cataloginventory_stock_item.list', array(array('sku' => (string)$productSKU))); ``` - Session Management: Manage sessions properly to avoid issues with expired or invalid session IDs. - Error Handling & Logging: Implement robust error handling and logging mechanisms for debugging purposes. ### Conclusion:
